since_last: 55% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.17%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC +2.47% · Gold +2.32% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 55% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.17%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.17%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -5.35%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -22.42%
cards.body: Leaders: LSCC +7.22%, TER +7.12%, KLAC +6.68%, AMAT +6.05%, LRCX +5.79%. Laggards: IBM -22.42%, WDAY -9.57%, NOW -7.66%, INTU -6.93%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.80% at $140.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.80% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
